description: Payload for <!-- review-dispositions-{PR} --> PR-comment markers. Records per-finding engineer dispositions for PR code-review verdicts. Distinct from finding_dispositions (design-only, SMC-19). Governed by SMC-23.

schema_version.description: Schema version. 1 = legacy; 2 = includes severity, ac_cross_check, and stage per-entry fields; 3 = requires reviewer_source on every entry (writer-mandatory); 4 = adds per-entry internal_match and PR-level external_sources_reconciled, still requires reviewer_source on every entry; readers fall back to 'local' for absent v1/v2 values.

passes_run.description: Which prosecution passes ran in this review cycle (subset of [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]).

stable_finding_key.description: Stable identifier for the finding across re-reviews. Either 'file:line:normalized-title-hash' (local) or a GitHub comment ID (remote) -- 'gh-{comment_id}' when a comment yields a single finding, or a composite 'gh-{comment_id}-{hash}' when one comment yields multiple distinct findings. The normalized-title-hash is the first 8 hex chars of SHA-256 over the UTF-8 normalized title (see skills/review-judgment/SKILL.md § Stable Finding Key). Must not change on re-review of the same PR, with the known exception that a comment's finding-count classification changing between review passes can produce a different composite key for the same logical finding.

finding_id.description: Optional sequential label (e.g. F1) from the current review pass. Not stable across re-reviews; use stable_finding_key for resume identity.

pass.description: Prosecution pass number that originated this finding.

pass_role.description: Optional. Role label for the prosecution pass that originated this finding.

disposition.description: Engineer's disposition for this finding. 'defer' is used for partial-AC no-match findings that cannot be dismissed (loud-guard path).

classification.description: Whether this finding was load-bearing (required AskUserQuestion) or routine (recorded silently).

internal_match.description: v4: Optional. Whether this entry's finding was already caught internally (duplicate), was not previously caught (novel), or could not be resolved (ambiguous) relative to an external reviewer's findings. Absent on a resolved-external sustained entry is treated as 'ambiguous' by consumers -- a bookkeeping omission must never manufacture an escape. Uses match_status rather than a bare status key to avoid flat-key collision in the line-regex parser.

disposition_rationale.description: Why this specific finding received this disposition outcome.

artifact_citation.description: Optional. Inherited artifact that settles a routine classification.

also_flagged_by.description: Optional. Secondary prosecution pass ids that also flagged this finding.

severity.description: v2: Prosecution/judge severity for this finding. Matches the canonical producer enum in routing-config.json.

stage.description: v2: Which review stage produced this entry.

reviewer_source.description: Identifies the reviewer/source that produced this disposition entry, for review-cost accounting (e.g. 'local' for pipeline-origin findings). Normalization and the collision-escape rule are defined canonically in skills/code-review-intake/SKILL.md -- this field does not restate that mechanism. Distinct from the nested ac_cross_check.source field, which records the AC cross-check's evidence source and is unrelated to reviewer identity. Required on every entry when the containing schema_version is 3 or 4 (writer-mandatory); optional and typically absent on v1/v2 entries, where readers fall back to 'local'.

ac_cross_check.description: v2: AC cross-check outcome. Required on >=medium dismiss/defer entries.

external_sources_reconciled.description: v4: PR-level. Stable finding keys the judge has reconciled against an external reviewer's findings for this PR. Read only from judge-authored bodies; latest-wins merge is restricted to same-author (judge) bodies. See skills/calibration-pipeline SKILL.md for the observer/emission consumer of this field.
